action.reasoning: Observation: iter8 failed at model.fc access (CIFARResNet wraps resnet50 as self.model; no direct .fc attr), stage1 val~0.497 (slightly below prior best 0.544 from iter6's working 2-stage). Best overall still 0.5421 bal_acc with many/medium/few 0.777/0.559/0.265. Analysis: cRT-style 2-stage (Focal+sqrt-sampler stage1, balanced CE on frozen head stage2) is effective for CIFAR100-LT but current train.py has attr error + likely unstable SGD lr=0.2 causing val fluctuation in prior runs. Model/pretrained/RandAug/Focal setup solid. Decision: Add self.fc = self.model.fc to model.py for compatibility, rewrite train.py with clean stable 2-stage (30ep s1: Focal gamma=2 AdamW5e-4 1/sqrt+cosine; 20ep s2: freeze backbone, CE+SGD lr=0.05 mom=0.9 on head only with 1/count sampler+cosine, best-save by val_acc across stages, no smoothing). This recovers prior gains + stabilizes; train+submit_eval immediately (total ~45ep follows rule with prior baselines, ~4min fits budget).
